user_intent.intent_text: 验证链路利用率监控功能。选择 h1 到 h3 通信路径上的任意一条链路作为监控对象，使用程序已有的 probe 探测包从 h1 发送到 h3，配合持续流量至少 20 个包来触发可观测的链路利用率变化。只需要一个正向场景，成功标准是 probe 回包或监控结果中能看到该链路的利用率数值大于 0。
user_intent.topology_mapping: 关注 h1 到 h3 的通信路径，监控对象为该路径上的任意一条链路。
user_intent.observation_target: h1 到 h3 路径上一条被监控链路的利用率
user_intent.observation_method: 使用程序已有的 probe 探测包，并以 probe 回包或监控结果作为观测依据。
user_intent.expected_observation: 在持续业务流量驱动后，观测到的链路利用率数值应大于 0。
user_intent.traffic_pattern: 先发送至少 20 个包的持续流量，再发送 probe 相关探测包。

target_task.task_description: 验证链路利用率监控功能。选择 h1 到 h3 通信路径上的任意一条链路作为监控对象，使用程序已有的 probe 探测包从 h1 发送到 h3，配合持续流量至少 20 个包来触发可观测的链路利用率变化。只需要一个正向场景，成功标准是 probe 回包或监控结果中能看到该链路的利用率数值大于 0。
target_task.observation_focus: one monitored switch-to-switch link on the h1->h3 path
target_task.expected_observation_semantics: the returned probe observation should report utilization greater than zero after sustained traffic

observation_requirements.purpose: verify the probe response exposes a non-zero utilization value after traffic

sequence_contract.scenario_goal: drive sustained traffic and then issue a probe-based query for link utilization
sequence_contract.expected_observation: probe response includes utilization data greater than zero

completion:
{
  "task_id": "telemetry_monitoring_fallback",
  "task_description": "验证链路利用率监控功能。选择 h1 到 h3 通信路径上的任意一条链路作为监控对象，使用程序已有的 probe 探测包从 h1 发送到 h3，配合持续流量至少 20 个包来触发可观测的链路利用率变化。只需要一个正向场景，成功标准是 probe 回包或监控结果中能看到该链路的利用率数值大于 0。",
  "feature_under_test": "traffic_monitoring",
  "intent_category": "telemetry_monitoring",
  "observation_focus": "one monitored switch-to-switch link on the h1->h3 path",
  "observation_method": "probe_response",
  "expected_observation_semantics": "the returned probe observation should report utilization greater than zero after sustained traffic",
  "operator_actions": [],
  "observation_requirements": [
    {
      "order": 1,
      "action_type": "custom",
      "target_hint": "inspect_probe_response",
      "timing": "after_scenario",
      "purpose": "verify the probe response exposes a non-zero utilization value after traffic"
    }
  ],
  "traffic_pattern": null,
  "role_bindings": {
    "traffic_src": "h1",
    "traffic_dst": "h3",
    "probe_src": "h1",
    "probe_dst": "h3"
  },
  "sequence_contract": [
    {
      "scenario": "positive",
      "kind": "positive",
      "required": true,
      "scenario_goal": "drive sustained traffic and then issue a probe-based query for link utilization",
      "expected_observation": "probe response includes utilization data greater than zero",
      "steps": [
        {
          "tx_role": "traffic_src",
          "rx_role": "traffic_dst",
          "protocol_stack": [
            "Ethernet",
            "IPv4"
          ],
          "repeat_count": 20,
          "traffic_profile": "sustained_background_traffic",
          "field_expectations": {
            "Ethernet.etherType": "0x0800"
          }
        },
        {
          "tx_role": "probe_src",
          "rx_role": "probe_dst",
          "protocol_stack": [
            "Ethernet",
            "probe",
            "probe_fwd"
          ],
          "repeat_count": 1,
          "traffic_profile": "probe_query",
          "field_expectations": {
            "Ethernet.etherType": "0x0812",
            "probe.hop_cnt": 0,
            "probe_fwd.egress_spec": 1
          }
        }
      ],
      "field_relations": [],
      "allow_additional_packets": false
    }
  ],
  "require_positive_and_negative": false,
  "generation_mode": "packet_only",
  "forbidden_tables": []
}

user_intent.intent_text: 验证 heavy hitter 检测功能。可以在测试前由人工把交换机的阈值临时调低到 10。然后让 h1 向 h2 发送同一条五元组 TCP 流，期望前 10 个包可以转发，第 11 个及之后的包被丢弃；另外再生成一个不同五元组的新 TCP 流，期望它不受前一条流影响。
user_intent.topology_mapping: 测试 h1 到 h2 的 TCP 流量行为，并比较同一五元组与不同五元组的差异。
user_intent.operator_constraints: 测试前允许人工将阈值临时调低到 10。
user_intent.traffic_pattern: 先发送一条重复五元组 TCP 流，再发送一条不同五元组的新 TCP 流。

target_task.task_description: 验证 heavy hitter 检测功能。可以在测试前由人工把交换机的阈值临时调低到 10。然后让 h1 向 h2 发送同一条五元组 TCP 流，期望前 10 个包可以转发，第 11 个及之后的包被丢弃；另外再生成一个不同五元组的新 TCP 流，期望它不受前一条流影响。

operator_actions.expected_effect: threshold is lowered to 10 before traffic begins

sequence_contract.scenario_goal: send a repeated TCP flow below the heavy-hitter threshold and observe forwarding
continue the same TCP flow beyond the threshold and expect drop behavior
send a different TCP flow and verify it is not affected by the previous heavy hitter
